name: Jupiter Transit 4th from Moon — Property Acquisition Window
description: Transit Jupiter passing through the 4th house from natal Moon activates the property axis. This is the strongest single transit for property acquisition and home-related gains.

source_text.quote: When Jupiter transits the 4th from Moon, the native acquires vehicles, lands, and happiness. Comforts of home increase and immovable property is gained.

all_of: Transit Jupiter is in the 4th house from natal Moon sign
any_of: No malefic opposition to transit Jupiter

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter's transit through the 4th from Moon is the classical indicator for property gains. The native finds opportunities to buy land, receive property, or improve their home situation significantly.

metadata.notes: Strongest single transit for property. Jupiter in 4th from Moon = sukha (happiness through property).

name: Jupiter Transit 9th from Moon — Father's Property & Fortune
description: Transit Jupiter in the 9th from Moon activates the father/fortune axis. Paternal property transfers, ancestral blessings, and fortune through inheritance become active.

source_text.quote: Jupiter transiting the 9th from Moon brings fortune through father, gains from guru, and blessings that manifest as property and ancestral wealth flowing to the native.

all_of: Transit Jupiter is in the 9th house from natal Moon sign
any_of: Jupiter aspects natal Sun during transit

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter activating the 9th from Moon brings paternal fortune. Father's property may transfer, ancestral blessings materialize as wealth, and dharmic fortune manifests through inheritance.

metadata.notes: 9th from Moon = father/fortune. Jupiter here activates paternal property and ancestral wealth transfer.

name: Jupiter Transit 8th from Moon — Inheritance Activation
description: Transit Jupiter in the 8th from Moon activates the inheritance house. Hidden wealth surfaces, inheritance matters come to resolution, and sudden property gains through legacy.

source_text.quote: Jupiter in the 8th from Moon brings gains through inheritance, insurance, and hidden sources. Wealth of the deceased flows to the native when Jupiter blesses the 8th.

all_of: Transit Jupiter is in the 8th house from natal Moon sign
any_of: 8th lord is not heavily afflicted natally
Jupiter aspects natal 8th lord during transit
Benefic planets support the 8th house natally

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter transiting the 8th from Moon activates the inheritance axis. Hidden wealth, insurance proceeds, and ancestral property that was locked become accessible. Smooth resolution of inheritance matters.

metadata.notes: Jupiter in 8th from Moon = positive inheritance resolution. Different from malefic in 8th (disputes).

name: Jupiter Conjunct Natal Sun — Father's Wealth Transfer
description: Transit Jupiter conjunct natal Sun activates the father-wealth connection. Sun represents father; Jupiter's conjunction brings paternal wealth, property transfer from father, or gains through authority.

source_text.quote: When Jupiter conjoins the natal Sun in transit, favor from father and king flows. The native receives paternal wealth, gains authority over property, and is honored with assets.

all_of: Transit Jupiter is within 5 degrees of natal Sun longitude
any_of: Jupiter is direct and strong in transit

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter touching natal Sun activates the father-wealth axis. This is a key transit for receiving paternal property, gaining authority over family assets, and financial favor from authority figures.

metadata.notes: Jupiter-Sun = father's blessing materialized. One of the most reliable transits for paternal property gains.

name: Saturn Conjunct Natal Mars — Property Loss & Disputes
description: Transit Saturn conjunct natal Mars creates friction in property matters. Mars (land) afflicted by Saturn (delay, obstruction) indicates property loss, disputes with authorities, or delayed land deals.

source_text.quote: Saturn transiting over natal Mars brings loss of property, disputes with brothers over land, and obstruction in all matters related to immovable assets and real estate.

all_of: Transit Saturn is within 5 degrees of natal Mars longitude

interpretation.meaning: Saturn crushing natal Mars creates property difficulties. Land deals are delayed or lost, disputes arise with brothers/neighbors over boundaries, and existing property may face legal challenges or encroachment.

metadata.notes: Negative transit. Saturn on Mars = land problems, delays, disputes. Avoid property transactions.

name: Saturn Transit 9th from Moon — Father/Legacy Matters
description: Transit Saturn in 9th from Moon activates karmic father/legacy issues. Can bring delayed inheritance, father's health concerns triggering property discussions, or structured legacy planning.

source_text.quote: Saturn transiting the 9th from Moon brings concerns regarding father's well-being and fortune. Inheritance matters surface through duty and karmic obligation rather than joy.

all_of: Transit Saturn is in the 9th house from natal Moon sign
any_of: 9th lord is connected to Saturn natally
Saturn aspects natal Sun during transit

interpretation.meaning: Saturn in 9th from Moon brings karmic father/legacy themes. Inheritance may be delayed but eventually arrives. Father's situation (health/finances) may force property discussions. Duty-bound inheritance.

metadata.notes: Saturn in 9th = karmic duty around father/legacy. Not always negative but always duty-heavy.
